title: How to create Phone Call Acitivity using Monday API

posts.author: Fahad (Fahad)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to do something very simple but Monday’s API doesn;t seem to have this option

“Create Phone Call” activity to an item.

On the Monday API, it only shows us how to create an activity if you know the ID of the custom activity, how can I create an activity for the default activities

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Fahad,

As of today it is not possible to do that, so I have turned this into a feature request

posts.author: Fahad (Fahad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Matias:

As of today it is not possible to do that, so I have turned this into a feature request

Oh, so it’s not possible to create a phone call activity or any other default activity?

But I can do this for Custom Activity?
